---
title: "Blogs"
---

Here I share posts about topics that interest me and I am trying to learn, ranging from statistics and machine learning/AI to the drug discovery process. Click "Read more" to explore each post in detail.

<!-- Preview of Blog Post 1 -->

## Mathematical Derivation of VAE

*Published on: Jan 2026*

A concise walkthrough of the mathematical foundations behind Variational Autoencoders (VAE) highlighting key derivations and concepts for understanding how they work.

[Read more](blogs/VAE_derivation/VAE_derivation.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Modelling DNA-Encoded Libraries (DELs) - Part 1

*Published on: April 2026*

A three-part series developing a probabilistic framework for DNA-encoded library (DEL) data. The goal is to explain noisy sequencing counts in terms of latent compound-level and synthon-level effects so that true enrichment can be separated from technical and compositional artefacts. Part 1 focuses on likelihood choice, data-generation assumptions, and the modelling implications of background effects, library composition, and replicate variation.

[Read more](blogs/DEL_Model/DEL_modelling_Part_1.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
